name: Chocolate Butter2
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the cocoa powder and confectioners sugar until combined.
2. Sift the mixture over a piece of waxed paper to distribute evenly.
3. In a medium bowl, beat the butter with an electric mixer on medium speed until creamy.
4. Gradually add the cocoa-sugar mixture and vanilla extract, continuing to beat for 1 minute or until smooth.
5. Pack the mixture into a small crock.
6. Serve immediately or cover and refrigerate until ready to serve. If chilled, allow the butter to stand at room temperature for about 15 minutes before serving to soften slightly.
